max_achievable_scores.explanation: Scores are capped by test infrastructure issues: (1) output-exists criterion (10pts per task) always fails because testPattern regex doesn't match JUnit test names, (2) admission-count (15pts) and discharge-count (15pts) criteria on medication-reconciliation also fail systematically. All models across all sessions hit this same ceiling.

changes_made: Reduced SKILL.md from 270 lines to 120 lines for better fit in devstral-small context window
Restructured into two clear task sections (entity extraction and medication reconciliation)
Added explicit instruction that each medication belongs in exactly ONE reconciliation category
Added explicit instruction not to put switched medications in discontinued/new_meds
Provided complete concrete output examples matching expected test format
Removed verbose sections: ICD-10 codes, Python pseudocode, top-20 drug list, implementation algorithm
Simplified negation detection to essential triggers with clear examples
Added explicit minimum entity count guidance (at least 15)
